testcase.name: test_get_admin_plans

failure.message: AssertionError: Plan Professional missing trial_days assert 'trial_days' in {'created_at': '2026-03-05T07:54:54.411868+00:00', 'description': 'Para negocios en crecimiento', 'features': ['50 proveedores', '20 catálogos', '10 tiendas WooCommerce', 'API REST completa', 'Exportación ilimitada', 'Soporte 24/7'], 'id': 'b71aba4d-f99a-4d65-bbb8-315f108fbe24', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_trial_days_stripe.py:80: in test_get_admin_plans assert "trial_days" in plan, f"Plan {plan['name']} missing trial_days" E AssertionError: Plan Professional missing trial_days E assert 'trial_days' in {'created_at': '2026-03-05T07:54:54.411868+00:00', 'description': 'Para negocios en crecimiento', 'features': ['50 proveedores', '20 catálogos', '10 tiendas WooCommerce', 'API REST completa', 'Exportación ilimitada', 'Soporte 24/7'], 'id': 'b71aba4d-f99a-4d65-bbb8-315f108fbe24', ...}
